channel.title: Agent Assist on Documentation for Hugo Learn Theme
channel.description: Recent content in Agent Assist on Documentation for Hugo Learn Theme

item.title: Integration Setup
item.description: Integration Setup Create a project and a service account in your Google Cloud Platform console You can also use the project that you created in the DialogFlow CX section of this workshop. Just create a new service account within that project. Enable in your project the “Dialogflow API” and the “Data Labeling API” https://cloud.google.com/dialogflow/es/docs/quick/setup#api https://cloud.google.com/ai-platform/data-labeling/docs/before-you-begin Navigate to the Dialogflow console for your project and then upgrade to the Pay as You Go DialogFlow Essentials Package https://dialogflow.
